allowed_controlled_smoke_scope: Chrome/CDP observe-only marker inspection in an isolated profile
bridge-only dry-run if no secrets, no real upload, and no apply path is triggered
page-event query only: openpatch:api:get-buttons, openpatch:api:get-runtime-status, openpatch:api:get-compact-summary
blocked_actions: live Auto Continue adapter install or control
requesting or exposing PATs, cookies, browser profile internals, .env, or private credentials
treating hosted GitHub artifacts as merge/install/owner approval

issues.summary: Button-marker self-test checks source-string presence, not a runtime DOM fixture or schema validation path.
evidence: checks/V17_BUTTON_MARKER_COUNTER_RESULTS.json records schema field assertions with object values in passed instead of strict booleans.
issues.impact: A future regression could satisfy string checks while failing DOM behavior or schema-level semantics.

issues.summary: openpatch.agent_button.v17.schema.json requires key fields but leaves status, asset_kind, route_decision, allowed_action, counter_scope as generic strings and allows additional properties.
issues.impact: Invalid route/approval semantics could pass schema-shaped checks.

issues.summary: candidate-v17-button-marker/README.md still identifies the package as v16 and says marker upgraded to openpatch.agent_button.v16.
issues.impact: Codex or a reviewer using the root README as the entry point may misread the active generation and marker contract.

issues.summary: Global visible count and API response count remain loaded-DOM counts. Docs state agents should prefer button_id or message_id plus message_button_index, but live evidence is still needed under ChatGPT lazy loading.
issues.impact: A naive agent could still misuse loaded-DOM counts as historical totals.

issues.summary: message_id falls back to a compact hash of mutable text/link/button hints when explicit message attributes are unavailable.
issues.impact: It is a practical local locator, not a cryptographic or persistent identity.

required_fixes: Before v18 packaging, update README.md and any root entry text from v16 to v17-button-marker and openpatch.agent_button.v17.
Replace string-only marker self-test with a small DOM/runtime fixture that creates buttons, calls marker functions or page APIs, and asserts actual dataset values.
Make V17_BUTTON_MARKER_COUNTER_RESULTS.json assertion passed values strict booleans.
Tighten openpatch.agent_button.v17.schema.json with enums or consts for status, asset_kind, route_decision, allowed_action, not_approval semantics, and counter_scope; keep unknown values blocked.
Add smoke evidence fields proving agents should use button_id or message_id plus message_button_index, not whole-page counts.
recommended_next_step: Run one controlled Chrome/CDP observe-only v17 marker smoke and return evidence JSON; do not click upload/apply. In parallel, prepare v18 fixes for README staleness, stricter schema, and runtime DOM self-test.
